titleStmt.title: SII 17.594: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 594. (A.R. No. 549 of 1904). TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This inscription commences with the praśasti, Pūmaṉṉupadumam, etc., of Kulōttuṅga II and stops after mentioning the date.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pumaṉṟuRead pū maṉṉu.patumam pūtta veḻulakun tāmuṉ ceytavattāl parutivaḻit tonṟi neṭumāliva neṉac cuṭarmuṭi cūṭi yirunilamakaḷai Urimaiyiṟ puṇarntu tiru makaḷ paṇaimulaic ce(ya)ñcān taḷaintu parumaṇimārvam paṉivarai nikaṟppa ceyamakaḷ ceñcantaṉa (cantana)c cuvaṭṭāl puyamiru kayilaip poruppeṉat toṉṟi tiru makaḷ tāṉumeṅkomakaḷ cevvāyp pavaḻac ceyoḷi paṭaittaṉan niyāneṉat tavaḷanaṉ niṟaṉ taṉittoṭaiyeneṉap pukaḻ makaḷ cintai makuḻuRead makiḻu.naṉnāḷiṉum Oru kuṭai nilavum porupaṭaittikiri veyililuṅ karuṅ
kaliyiruḷiṉait tuṟappa niṭupallūḻi yeḻkaṭaṟ puṟattiṉuṅ koṭāc centaṉik koli ṉi tulāva miṉamuñ cilaiyuñ citaittu vāṉuyar poṉneṭumeruviṟ puli viṟṟiruppa Umparyāṉai Oreṭṭiṉukkun tampameṉṉat taṉittaṉi ticaitoṟum vicaiyasta(ta)mpa niṟpa pacipakaiyā[ṉiti tu niṅ]ki maṉṉuyir taḻaippa maṉuvāṟu viḷaṅka mātavar tavamu maṅ kaiyar kaṟpum Ātiyantaṇarākutikkaṉalu miteḻukoṇṭal vicutaṇpuṉalu metiṉivaḷamu cātiyoḻukkamum nītiyaṟamum piṟaḻātu nikaḻp pāvum paḻaṉapparappum paṉaikkai māvu mallatu vanḷaiṟappaṭutal kaṉaviluṅ kāṇṭaṟ kariteṉa varuntic cu
ṉaiyilum palaveṟu puḷḷiṉumallatu ciṟaiyeṉappaṭutalaṉṟi niṟaiperuñ celvamoṭavani vāḻap pallavar teluṅkar vāḷuvar kaliṅkar kocalar kannara kaṭārar ciṅkaṇar teṉ nar cetikar tirikattar vaṅka raṅkar pāttivar mattirar kaṅkar coṉakar kaiykayār jiṉa reṉ ṟaṟaikaḻalventaru mellā Araicaru muṟaimaiyil varinta tiṟaikuṇarn tiṟaiñca kimaiyappoṟkoṭṭimaiyap pāvaiyuñ civanaruḷ peṟṟup puvanamuḻutuṭaiyā ḷivaṉ tiruviḷḷattaruḷu muḻutuṭaiyāḷeṉa Uṭaṉiruppa Ampoṉ malaṟkoṭi cempiyaṉ kiḻā naṭi yuṭaṉ tirumaṇimārvat taruḷuṭaṉiruppa cempoṉ virasiṁhāsaṉattup puva
ṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripaṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravart tikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 10 5 ĀvatuThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 17.594 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
